description: General-purpose Go library with base utilities for microservices: structured errors (kerrors), a generic Result type, an error-accumulating context (customctx), generic repositories, an event bus, and a structured logger with a batched Grafana Loki hook.
rules: rkit is a single Go module: github.com/reitmas32/rkit (Go 1.25+).
Import packages by full path, e.g. import "github.com/reitmas32/rkit/core/result".
Return *kerrors.KError instead of bare errors; prefer result.Result[T] over (T, error) across layers.
The structured logger is observability/logger/loguru; ship logs to Loki with hooks.NewLokiBufferedHook and call Flush() to send partial batches.
Prefer the runnable Example functions and doc.go package comments as the source of truth for API usage.
